name: scanpy
tagline: Runs the standard Scanpy single-cell RNA-seq workflow (QC, normalization, clustering, markers, plotting) via bundled CLI scripts and code.
verdict: Solid, safe bioinformatics workflow skill: no security red flags, concrete commands, stated defaults, and bulk material split into references/assets. Weaknesses: a script path contradicts the doc's own convention (could break execution), no failure-handling guidance across a 12-script chain, the main install is unpinned, and harmony/bbknn dependencies for.

highlights.summary: Line 19: uv pip install "scanpy[leiden]" is unpinned by default; a pinned version is only offered as a secondary suggestion.
Line 188 uses `python skills/scanpy/scripts/qc_analysis.py`, contradicting the `scripts/<name>.py` convention used everywhere else (e.g. line 56).
No explicit failure/stop guidance across the 12-script chain; line 414 only notes workflows 'can fail partway through' with no fallback described.
